name: superpowers-extensions
description: Quality-gate, refactor, project-orchestration, UI workflow, and design-system skills extending the obra/superpowers suite.

interface.shortDescription: Quality gates, refactor analysis, project lifecycle, UI workflow, and design systems for the superpowers suite.
interface.longDescription: Eleven extension skills that compose with obra/superpowers: regression-test (Playwright UI testing), pre-push-review (branch quality gate), refactor-analysis (transitive impact analysis), decision-tracker (cross-session memory), roslyn-codelens-integration (.NET semantic intelligence), memorylens-integration (.NET memory profiling), project-orchestration (multi-session lifecycle with brainstorm-first milestones), ui-workflow (design contracts + 3-layer audit), ui-design-system (70 vendored references + 5 OKLch directions), squad (persistent AI agent teams), and compress-memory (memory file compression). Source-of-truth markdown skills work across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Copilot CLI, and OpenCode.
